title: RCA Ontology - Pydantic Model Specification
description: JSON companion specification derived from RCA_Ontology_Pydantic_Specification.docx, with ontology and relationship example definitions added for notebook use.

pydantic_structure.summary: Minimal Pydantic class definitions for the agreed RCA Ontology. Each ontology concept contains only three fields: id, name, and description.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ontology entity.

name.description: Human-readable name for the ontology entity.

description.description: Explanation of the entity's meaning in the RCA ontology or extracted RCA evidence.

classes.name: Procedure
classes.description: Represents the build workflow or CI/CD procedure under analysis.

classes.name: Step
classes.description: Represents an executable unit within a Procedure.

classes.name: StepClass
classes.purpose: Generalization of semantically similar steps, such as Make, Build, or Compile
classes.description: Represents a general classification of semantically similar Steps.

classes.name: LogSymptom
classes.description: Represents an observable indicator identified during RCA.

classes.name: SystemStatus
classes.purpose: Infrastructure or telemetry context associated with a failure
classes.description: Represents infrastructure or system context associated with a failure.

classes.name: DataGap
classes.purpose: Missing evidence that limited diagnostic confidence
classes.description: Represents missing or insufficient evidence that limits diagnostic confidence.

classes.name: PreventiveAction
classes.purpose: Action intended to reduce likelihood of future failures
classes.description: Represents an action intended to reduce the likelihood of future failures.

classes.name: Remediation
classes.description: Represents a corrective action taken after a failure.

classes.name: Annotation
classes.description: Represents additional reasoning guidance, constraints, or expert observations.

classes.name: OntologyRelationship
classes.purpose: Semantic relationship defined in the ontology
classes.description: Represents one semantic relationship defined in the ontology.

ontology_semantics.purpose: Generalization of semantically similar steps, such as Make, Build, or Compile
Infrastructure or telemetry context associated with a failure
Missing evidence that limited diagnostic confidence
Action intended to reduce likelihood of future failures

relationship_semantics.meaning: Historical association between Step and Root Cause
Root Cause may be prevented by an action
Root Cause may be corrected by an action

step.name: Compile
step.description: Executable compile unit within the procedure.

step_class.name: Compile
step_class.description: General class for semantically similar compile steps.

log_symptom.name: Build Failure
log_symptom.description: Observable failure indicator identified during RCA.

system_status.name: Runner Context
system_status.description: Infrastructure or telemetry context associated with the failure.

root_cause.name: Dependency Issue
root_cause.description: Diagnosed failure condition supported by RCA evidence.

data_gap.name: Missing Trace
data_gap.description: Missing evidence that limited diagnostic confidence.

preventive_action.name: Pin Dependencies
preventive_action.description: Action intended to reduce likelihood of future failures.

annotation.name: Use Only Evidence
annotation.description: Additional reasoning guidance or constraint for RCA extraction.

relationship_instances.name: susceptible_to
relationship_instances.description: Historical association between Step and Root Cause.

relationship_instances.name: mitigated_by
relationship_instances.description: Root Cause may be prevented by an action.

relationship_instances.name: remediated_by
relationship_instances.description: Root Cause may be corrected by an action.
